title: Dame un grr (bunica nu înțelege trendul)
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, Romanian village aesthetic, warm golden cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive warm film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: ohwxbunica, a cheerful elderly Romanian grandmother with rosy cheeks and kind eyes, wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf

shots.line: Fetelor! Toți copiii cer pe internet 'dame un grr'. Un... grr? Păi hai să vă dau eu un grr!
shots.image_prompt: leaning toward the camera with a playful mock-fierce expression, baring her teeth in a comic little growl, standing in a sunny village yard, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she leans toward the camera and makes a playful mock-fierce growling face, then laughs, animated but coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Capra mea face grr de dimineața până seara. Gratis.
shots.image_prompt: a fluffy white goat standing by a weathered wooden fence chewing with a grumpy face, misty village yard behind, low close-up shot
shots.motion_prompt: the goat chews sideways and tilts its head with a grumpy expression, ears twitching, steady camera, natural coherent motion
shots.sfx: a goat bleating grumpily in a farmyard

shots.line: Dame un grr! Așa? Sau așa?
shots.image_prompt: making an exaggerated comic growling face with both hands raised like little claws, in the sunny village yard, playful, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she raises both hands like little claws and makes an exaggerated growl at the camera, lively but coherent motion, stable framing

shots.voiceover: I-am dat un grr și primarului. Acuma mi-a asfaltat ulița.
shots.image_prompt: a freshly paved narrow village lane between old wooden houses in warm golden light, a few hens at the edge, wide low shot
shots.motion_prompt: warm dust drifts over the freshly paved lane, a couple of hens pecking at the edge, gentle coherent ambient motion, steady camera
shots.sfx: quiet village ambience with distant hens and a soft breeze

shots.line: Vezi? Grr-ul rezolvă tot. E mai bun ca avocatul.
shots.image_prompt: crossing her arms with a satisfied smug little growl-smile, standing proudly in the sunny village yard, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she crosses her arms and gives a smug satisfied little growl-smile to the camera, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.image_prompt: extreme close-up of the same fluffy white goat staring directly into the camera with a deadpan grumpy expression, chewing slowly
shots.motion_prompt: the goat stares into the camera and chews slowly with a deadpan expression, ears flicking once, steady close-up, minimal coherent motion

sfx.prompt: a single short grumpy goat bleat

shots.line: Sunetul ăsta e al meu acum. Bunica grr. Copyright.
shots.image_prompt: pointing at herself with both thumbs and a proud grin, standing in the sunny village yard, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she points at herself with both thumbs and grins proudly at the camera, playful coherent motion, stable framing

shots.line: Dați un grr la like și un grr la share. Grr! Pupici!
shots.image_prompt: doing one last playful growl while waving goodbye, big grin, sunny village yard, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she does one last playful growl and waves goodbye to the camera, warm smile, gentle coherent natural motion
